summary: Source fidelity is complete and non-blocking for the registry markdown provenance repair. The repaired NCT04313634 locators retain source_id nct-04313634, source_snapshot_id snapshot-nct-04313634-clinicaltrials-v2-2026-06-21, and text_snapshot_id text-snapshot-nct-04313634-clinicaltrials-v2-2026-06-21, and the text snapshot is derived from the same ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshot.

findings.claim_or_issue: All repaired NCT04313634 registry locators use the same source, source snapshot, and retained text snapshot identifiers.
findings.why_it_matters: The provenance repair must strengthen locator auditability without remapping evidence to a different source or snapshot.
findings.recommended_action: Keep these identifiers stable unless a future ClinicalTrials.gov refresh creates a new source_snapshot and text_snapshot pair.

findings.claim_or_issue: The retained text_snapshot record cites source_id nct-04313634 and source_snapshot_id snapshot-nct-04313634-clinicaltrials-v2-2026-06-21, matching the linked source_snapshot record.
findings.why_it_matters: Registry markdown locators are only source-faithful if the normalized text was generated from the exact snapshot cited by extraction-grade records.
findings.recommended_action: Continue citing both source_snapshot_id and text_snapshot_id on extraction-grade registry provenance for this retained registry payload.
